Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Damascan soldiers]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — Damascan soldiers are a group of soldiers that Simon wonders about in relation to captured children.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Damascan soldiers were the captors of the villagers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Damascan soldiers are present in the cave and carry weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — Damascan soldiers are patrolling the streets.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Damascan soldiers killed Ilana's betrothed during the raid on Myria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Simon has killed some Damascan soldiers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Damascan troops are engaged in combat with Nye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — Damascan soldiers were marching up to meet Grandmaster Helgard at the Gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Damascan soldiers carried Simon.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Erastes is considered the perfect image of a Damascan soldier.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
